order_lifecycle_event.name: OrderLifecycleEvent
order_lifecycle_event.doc: One record per order state transition. Tracks an order from placement to delivery or cancellation.

fields.name: event_id
fields.doc: Unique event ID — used for deduplication.

fields.name: order_id
fields.doc: Stable order ID — join key with courier_location_event.

fields.name: restaurant_id
fields.doc: Fulfilling restaurant — join key for restaurant reference table.

fields.name: courier_id
fields.doc: Null until COURIER_ASSIGNED.

fields.name: zone_id
fields.doc: Delivery zone — join key for zone reference table.

fields.name: event_type
fields.doc: State machine transition. Illegal sequences are anomalies.

fields.name: event_time
fields.doc: When the event actually occurred — basis for watermarks and event-time windows.

fields.name: ingestion_time
fields.doc: When the event arrived at the broker. Delta vs event_time = out-of-order delay.

fields.name: order_value_cents
fields.doc: Order total in cents (avoids float rounding).

fields.name: payment_method
fields.doc: CREDIT_CARD | DEBIT_CARD | DIGITAL_WALLET | CASH

fields.name: platform
fields.doc: IOS | ANDROID | WEB

fields.name: is_duplicate
fields.doc: Producer-side retry flag — use for dedup operators.

fields.name: prep_duration_seconds
fields.doc: Negative or >7200 = anomaly.

fields.name: customer_rating
fields.doc: 1–5. May arrive late / out-of-order.

courier_location_event.name: CourierLocationEvent
courier_location_event.doc: High-frequency GPS ping from courier mobile app (~every 15s per courier).

fields.name: event_id
fields.doc: Unique ping ID — used for deduplication.

fields.name: courier_id
fields.doc: Join key with order_lifecycle_event and courier reference table.

fields.name: order_id
fields.doc: Active order. Null when idle.

fields.name: zone_id
fields.doc: Current zone (derived server-side from lat/lon).

fields.name: event_time
fields.doc: GPS device timestamp — event-time.

fields.name: ingestion_time
fields.doc: Broker arrival time. Delta = network latency / late arrival.

fields.name: speed_kmh
fields.doc: Values >150 km/h are anomalous.

fields.name: courier_status
fields.doc: ONLINE_IDLE | ONLINE_PICKUP | ONLINE_DELIVERING | OFFLINE

fields.name: vehicle_type
fields.doc: BICYCLE | MOTORCYCLE | CAR | SCOOTER

fields.name: battery_pct
fields.doc: Device battery 0–100. Low battery correlates with OFFLINE events.

fields.name: network_type
fields.doc: 5G | 4G | 3G | NO_SIGNAL. NO_SIGNAL = source of GPS gaps.
